option.value:
package de.velospot.domain.model
/** * Represents a geographic position with latitude and longitude. * Replaces raw [Pair] usage across location and routing APIs. */ data class GeoCoordinate( val latitude: Double, val longitude: Double )

option.name: updatedContent
